items.name_en: 【Exclusive Real Shot g11299 White Multicolor】This Emily notebook cover is from the Louis Vuitton x Takashi Murakami collaboration series, playfully reinterpreting the brand's classic elements with Monogram Multicolor canvas. The elegant background features Murakami's aesthetic colorful prints, while the leather interior flap and replaceable design add artisanal details. It can be paired with the Jane notebook, making it an elegant choice for long-lasting companionship. 22.5 x 2 x 14 cm (Height x Width x Length)

items.name_en: 【Exclusive Photo m13399 White】This Rosalie coin purse is from the Louis Vuitton x Takashi Murakami reissue collection, dyeing the Monogram coated canvas with vibrant tones to cleverly pay homage to the distinctive style of Japanese artist Takashi Murakami. The compact structure features a rounded flap and snap closure, with an internal space including a coin purse with a Monogram pull tab. 8 x 2.5 x 11 cm (H x W x D)

items.name_en: 【Exclusive Photo m14163 White】This Victorine wallet from the Louis Vuitton x Murakami series is small and exquisite. The colorful Monogram pattern reinterprets the classic motif with the famous rainbow tones of Japanese artist Takashi Murakami. The wallet is made of coated canvas with exquisite calfskin lining and silver hardware, and features a zip coin pocket, with multiple compartments inside for bills and business cards. 12 x 9.5 x 2.5 cm (L x H x W)

items.name_en: 🌷Includes full original green box packaging🌷GG Marmont Wallet. This GG Marmont Wallet is crafted in classic and durable burgundy leather, adding a classic piece to the 'Aria' collection. The double-G hardware reinterprets the 1970s belt buckle design using matching resin material. The combination of classic design and monochrome colorway highlights a modern fashion style.

items.name_en: 🆕 Chip Version Top-tier Original M12425 Single-zip Wallet Introducing the new Margot Wallet, a stylish piece that achieves a perfect balance between contemporary and classic design. It is made from the iconic Monogram Empreinte leather, featuring polished gold hardware, including a metal plate engraved with the iconic Louis Vuitton signature. The interior offers multiple pockets and compartments for coins and bills, plus six card slots. Size 17 x 11 x 2cm
